Elephant Charge 2010

24 October 2010 · 📍 Makwishi Hill

17 Entries
12 Completed
71% Finish rate
$64,844 Raised
9 Checkpoints
3× Gauntlet mult.
Results Checkpoints Awards Grants 🗺 Map

Net distance = competition distance minus penalties. Shorter net distance = better result. Gauntlet checkpoints carry a ×3 distance penalty.

Spirit of the Charge

Team 64 — For an epic journey from Kenya to arrive at the charge at 2am and then a very competitive run. Autoworld and The Green Mambas were both mentioned for their selfless conduct before and during the competition.

Elephant Charge results archive — data updated annually after each event.
